title: Mimophytum cardiophyllum
taxonomy: Mimophytum cardiophyllum is a species within the family Boraginaceae. This plant is classified as a member of the Boraginaceae family, which includes other flowering plants commonly known as borage or forget-me-nots. The genus Mimophytum is part of the broader group of plants classified as Boraginophyta. Mimophytum cardiophyllum is native to the southwestern regions of North America, including Mexico and the southwestern United States. Further classification at the species level may be made based on characteristics such as leaf shape and flower color.

The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues, including inflammation and digestive problems, due to its purported health benefits.
